reference: I have had pulmonary tuberculosis since two thousand and ten, but the doctors informed me that I need treatment. I have been undergoing treatment for the past six months and have already completed it. Now, I am applying again to work abroad in the United Arab Emirates. I currently have a visa and am waiting for the medical results to see if my scar is visible again because the doctors said the scar is totally healed and cured. I hope God will give me a chance to work abroad again.
text: I have had pulmonary tuberculosis since 2010, but the doctors informed me that I need treatment. I have been undergoing treatment for the past six months and have already completed it. Now, I am applying again to work abroad in the United Arab Emirates. I currently have a visa and am waiting for the medical results to see if my scar is visible again, because the doctor said the scar is totally healed and cured. I hope God will give me a chance to work abroad again.
